proposed.claim: The schema's single source of truth is `lib/cb/belief.ex`. The graph's own schema is expressed as contracts in the graph: c051 (the four structural types), c053 (status lifecycle and immutability), c056 (schema discipline), c039/c043/c041 (the closed kind/artifact-scheme/domain enums), c057 (the kind-type table), c058 (subject containment), c059 (directive grounding), and c055 (conflict scope). Read one with `mix bs show cb:c051`.

reasoning: cb-schema-v2: the contract id map regenerates after the c026-family supersessions; the three new v2 contracts join the family.
